stemHtml: While flying on an easterly track and crossing the dateline, the Local Time (LT) will (1)_____ and the date (2)_____.

options.a: (1) Move forward by 12 hours; (2) go back one day.
options.b: (1) Move backward by 12 hours; (2) go back one day.
options.c: (1) Remain the same; (2) go back one day.
options.d: (1) Remain the same; (2) go forward by one day.
